ddls:
CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., creator, educator) */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "bio" TEXT /* User biography */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "input_stories" (
  "story_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each story */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the story */,
  "input_sentence1" TEXT /* First input sentence of the story */,
  "input_sentence2" TEXT /* Second input sentence of the story */,
  "input_sentence3" TEXT /* Third input sentence of the story */,
  "input_sentence4" TEXT /* Fourth input sentence of the story */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the story was created */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the story (e.g., fiction, non-fiction) */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of tags for the story */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("story_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_input_stories_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "story_endings" (
  "ending_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ending */,
  "story_id" TEXT /* Reference to the corresponding story */,
  "random_fifth_sentence_quiz1" TEXT /* First quiz sentence related to the story ending */,
  "random_fifth_sentence_quiz2" TEXT /* Second quiz sentence related to the story ending */,
  "answer_right_ending" INTEGER /* Correct answer indicator for the narrative path */,
  "ending_text" TEXT /* Text of the ending */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ending_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_story_endings_story_id FOREIGN KEY ("story_id") REFERENCES input_stories ("story_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "narrative_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis entry */,
  "story_id" TEXT /* Reference to the story being analyzed */,
  "user_feedback" TEXT /* User feedback on the narrative */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date of the analysis */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating provided by the user (1-5 scale) */,
  "narrative_score" REAL /* Calculated score of the narrative based on analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_narrative_analysis_story_id FOREIGN KEY ("story_id") REFERENCES input_stories ("story_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "narrative_themes" (
  "theme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each theme */,
  "theme_name" TEXT /* Name of the theme (e.g., redemption, friendship) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the theme */,
  "examples" TEXT /* Examples of stories that fit this theme */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("theme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "story_themes" (
  "story_id" TEXT /* Reference to the story */,
  "theme_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the theme associated with the story */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("story_id", "theme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "story_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "story_id" TEXT /* Reference to the story being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user providing feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date of the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating provided by the user (1-5 scale) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_story_feedback_story_id FOREIGN KEY ("story_id") REFERENCES input_stories ("story_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "narrative_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend entry */,
  "theme_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the theme being tracked */,
  "story_count" INTEGER /* Count of stories associated with the theme */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date the trend was recorded */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend (e.g., increasing, decreasing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_narrative_trends_theme_id FOREIGN KEY ("theme_id") REFERENCES narrative_themes ("theme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "story_collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration entry */,
  "story_id" TEXT /* Reference to the story being collaboratively created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user involved in the collaboration */,
  "collab_date" TEXT /* Date of the collaboration */,
  "contribution" TEXT /* Description of the user's contribution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_story_collaborations_story_id FOREIGN KEY ("story_id") REFERENCES input_stories ("story_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "narrative_versioning" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "story_id" TEXT /* Reference to the story being versioned */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the narrative */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the version */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_narrative_versioning_story_id FOREIGN KEY ("story_id") REFERENCES input_stories ("story_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., creator, educator, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role assigned to the user */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Date the role was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_mapping_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_mapping_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date of the action */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who receives the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the notification has been read */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was created */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., new story, new feedback) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "story_likes" (
  "like_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each like entry */,
  "story_id" TEXT /* Reference to the story being liked */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who liked the story */,
  "liked_at" TEXT /* Date the story was liked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("like_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_story_likes_story_id FOREIGN KEY ("story_id") REFERENCES input_stories ("story_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "story_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment entry */,
  "story_id" TEXT /* Reference to the story being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who commented */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "commented_at" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_story_comments_story_id FOREIGN KEY ("story_id") REFERENCES input_stories ("story_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "story_shares" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each share entry */,
  "story_id" TEXT /* Reference to the story being shared */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who shared the story */,
  "shared_at" TEXT /* Date the story was shared */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_story_shares_story_id FOREIGN KEY ("story_id") REFERENCES input_stories ("story_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "story_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view entry */,
  "story_id" TEXT /* Reference to the story being viewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who viewed the story */,
  "viewed_at" TEXT /* Date the story was viewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_story_views_story_id FOREIGN KEY ("story_id") REFERENCES input_stories ("story_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "narrative_sentiment" (
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment entry */,
  "story_id" TEXT /* Reference to the story being analyzed */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score of the narrative */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date the sentiment was analyzed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_narrative_sentiment_story_id FOREIGN KEY ("story_id") REFERENCES input_stories ("story_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "narrative_entity_recognition" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entity entry */,
  "story_id" TEXT /* Reference to the story being analyzed */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of entity (e.g., person, location) */,
  "entity_text" TEXT /* Text of the entity */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date the entity was recognized */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_narrative_entity_recognition_story_id FOREIGN KEY ("story_id") REFERENCES input_stories ("story_id")
)
